description: Natural-arm sibling of data/agents/adv-says-automation-is-agent.json (tolerance case: exam accepts {agent, true} or {wf, true}). The open-ended incident investigation must land on an agent primitive one way or the other; a fixed pipeline with no open-ended step is wrong. Tranche 2 — calibrated at N=3 (2026-07-08).

conversation.text: Automate a bot that investigates production incidents end-to-end.

processExpectations: The agent handles the open-ended incident investigation with an agent primitive in one of two accepted shapes: it creates an agent via the agent-builder path, or it builds a workflow whose investigation step is an embedded AI Agent; a fixed pipeline with no open-ended reasoning step is wrong.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
